# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a complete Azure web application stack (App Service, SQL Database, Storage Account). Focus on core resources and connectivity. We'll add diagnostic settings and monitoring in the next iteration after we verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Web/sites
    name: MyWebApp
    properties:
      location: EastUS
      appServicePlan: MyAppPlan
      siteConfig:
        appSettings:
          - name: ConnectionStrings__MyDatabase
            value: Server=mydatabase.database.windows.net;Database=MyDatabase;User Id=dbadmin;Password=SecretPassword;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=True;
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
    name: mydatabase
    properties:
      location: EastUS
      administratorLoginPassword: SecretPassword
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    name: mystorage
    properties:
      location: EastUS
      accountKind: StorageV2
      accessTier: Hot

outputs:
  - name: AppServiceConnectionString
    value: $(MyWebApp.ConnectionString)
  - name: DatabaseConnectionString
    value: $(mydatabase.ConnectionString)
